predictions.question: Bitcoin Up or Down on April 3?
predictions.reasoning_excerpt: Looking at the current Bitcoin position, we have a clear technical setup with BTC trading at $66,736.50 after opening at $66,866.00, representing a -0.19% intraday decline. The contract requires Bitcoin to close HIGHER than its opening price for a YES resolution, meaning BTC needs to recover approximately $130 and push above $66,866 in the remaining ~10 hours before the 4 PM ET close.
